title: My Work Calendar to show subitems and items
excerpt: Please Please Please make it so that subitems populate to the calendar view of my work.

posts.author: AF-ITM (Angel Fielder)
posts.cookedHtml: Please Please Please make it so that subitems populate to the calendar view of my work.

posts.author: zsmith (Zach Smith)
posts.cookedHtml:
Subitems do populate to the calendar view of My Work. Just tested it now.

I would go check your settings in the “Customize” menu of My Work and make sure the date column has been chosen for subitems of the board you want the subitems to be showing in the calendar view. Also wouldn’t hurt to make sure the board itself is visible as well while you are there.

Hope this helps you out.

posts.author: WorkWizard (Jon)
posts.cookedHtml: This no longer seems to work. Has there been an update or change to how the calendar display subitems? Specifically timelines.

posts.author: zsmith (Zach Smith)
posts.cookedHtml:
Have you gone into the MyWork settings and made sure the timeline/date column is selected for subitems on the boards you want to populate your calendar view?

image1894×1119 156 KB

The image has highlighted the fact there are subitems in the calendar view of MyWork and where you need to specify the date/timeline column for subitems.
Hope this helps

posts.author: WorkWizard (Jon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Screenshot 2025-02-17 at 9.22.49 AM2368×846 125 KB

Yes, subitems’ and items’ (depending on the board) timelines are selected.

posts.author: zsmith (Zach Smith)
posts.cookedHtml: I don’t know what else would be keeping them from not showing other than there is no timeline in the timeline column for those subitems or you don’t have the boards selected in the Boards section to where they are hidden.

posts.author: jonathansimpson01 (Jonathan Simpson )
posts.cookedHtml: Have you checked if your work calendar integration supports displaying subitems? Some calendar tools only sync top-level tasks unless explicitly configured. If you’re using a platform like Monday.com or ClickUp, you may need to adjust visibility settings or use automation to link subitems. What platform are you working with?
